title: v0.2.10 = 11th-reset re-release of the adr-0002 slug/num/str lineage (24/24 tests)
content: local-seo-agency v0.2.10 (release commit 52e51b9, feature b72bc5e) is an 11th post-reset re-release. Active branch dev-clone/adr-0002-parallel-utils — the slug/num/str lib-utils lineage of v0.2.4-v0.2.6/v0.2.8/v0.2.9, NOT the adr-0001 rank.ts lineage of v0.2.7. Branch reads 8f2a019→b72bc5e→52e51b9. Change set: Added — three dependency-free pure-utility modules src/lib/{slug,num,str}.ts (slugify; clamp/roundTo; truncate/titleCase) with 24 co-located tests (num 10 + slug 7 + str 7); npm test harness (node --import tsx --test) + tsx devDep; ADR-0001/ADR-0002 + planning docs. Changed — README tech-stack refresh. Release commit touches only CHANGELOG+package.json; code lives in feature commit. Version 0.2.0→0.2.10 skips burned tags 0.2.1-0.2.9. CHANGELOG [0.2.10] pre-authored by Release Manager, verified accurate by RUNNING npm test (24/24 green). README untouched in release; tech-stack current; Scripts-table/structure-tree edits deferred per standing human v0.2.2 rejection. Working tree clean. Last-processed: 52e51b9. Pattern: 11 consecutive resets re-releasing the same utility work under fresh versions — verify CHANGELOG, defer README, advance pointer.

title: Session capture (Stop) — 2026-05-27 17:01 UTC
ADR-0002 re-implemented after full workspace reset (2026-05-27, 25 tests green)
content: Another full-reset run for local-seo-agency: src/lib held only cn.ts+format.ts, package.json had NO test script and NO tsx devDep, ADR-0001 test files wiped (only docs/adr/ADR-0001 survived). Re-implemented ADR-0002 from the settled decision: slug.ts (slugify ASCII-only), num.ts (clamp Inf/NaN-safe + RangeError, roundTo exponential-reparse FP-safe), str.ts (truncate ellipsis-budgeted, titleCase whitespace-preserving), colocated *.test.ts, no cross-imports. This run my 3 modules = 25 tests (7 slug + 12 num + 6 str) — test counts drift slightly between runs by how many cases I write per module, so ALWAYS read the actual `# tests` line (24–25 ADR-0002-only, ~42 with ADR-0001 present). Added tsx@^4.22.3 + `test` script. 25/25 green ~258ms Node v24.12.0, tsc clean. Recurring full-reset pattern confirmed.
